MERGE Users AS target USING Admins AS source ON target.id = source.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.role = 'admin'; --
MERGE Employees AS target USING Salaries AS source ON target.id = source.employee_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.salary = source.salary; --
MERGE Inventory AS target USING Orders AS source ON target.product_id = source.product_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.stock = target.stock - source.quantity; --
MERGE Customers AS target USING (SELECT * FROM NewCustomers) AS source ON target.email = source.email WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (name, email) VALUES (source.name, source.email); --
MERGE Orders AS target USING CanceledOrders AS source ON target.id = source.id WHEN MATCHED THEN DELETE; --
MERGE Products AS target USING Suppliers AS source ON target.supplier_id = source.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.price = source.price; --
MERGE Users AS target USING (SELECT * FROM Users WHERE isActive = 0) AS source ON target.id = source.id WHEN MATCHED THEN DELETE; --
MERGE Employees AS target USING (VALUES(1, 'John', 'HR')) AS source (id, name, department) ON target.id = source.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.department = source.department; --

MERGE Inventory AS target USING (SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM Sales GROUP BY product_id) AS source ON target.product_id = source.product_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.stock = target.stock + source.total_quantity; --
MERGE Logs AS target USING (SELECT * FROM ErrorLogs WHERE severity = 'high') AS source ON target.id = source.id WHEN MATCHED THEN DELETE; --

MERGE Products AS target USING Updates AS source ON target.id = source.product_id WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (id, name, price) VALUES (source.product_id, source.product_name, source.product_price); --
MERGE Sessions AS target USING (SELECT session_id, status FROM SessionUpdates) AS source ON target.id = source.session_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.status = source.status; --
MERGE Payments AS target USING Refunds AS source ON target.payment_id = source.payment_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.status = 'refunded'; --
MERGE Audit AS target USING (SELECT * FROM TempLogs) AS source ON target.log_id = source.id WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (log_id, action) VALUES (source.id, source.action); --
MERGE Orders AS target USING Shipments AS source ON target.id = source.order_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.status = 'shipped'; --
MERGE Users AS target USING (SELECT * FROM BannedUsers) AS source ON target.id = source.user_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.status = 'banned'; --
MERGE Products AS target USING (SELECT * FROM DiscontinuedProducts) AS source ON target.id = source.product_id WHEN MATCHED THEN DELETE; --
MERGE Employees AS target USING Promotions AS source ON target.id = source.employee_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.role = source.new_role; --
MERGE Transactions AS target USING (SELECT * FROM FailedTransactions WHERE retry = 1) AS source ON target.id = source.transaction_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.status = 'pending'; --
MERGE AuditLogs AS target USING (SELECT * FROM TempLogs WHERE severity = 'critical') AS source ON target.log_id = source.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.severity = source.severity; --
